metadata.description: MCP server for OneHome (CoreLogic) — search listings, fetch property details, photos, schools, saved searches. Authenticates via your portal bearer token or your real-estate agent's magic-link URL; can also capture the token from a signed-in portal.onehome.com tab via the fetchproxy browser extension.

plugins.name: onehome-mcp
plugins.description: MCP server for OneHome (CoreLogic) — search listings, get property details, photos, schools, saved searches
